title: Skill frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter at the top of a skill's SKILL.md file.

description.description: Third-person, trigger-rich description. Must include both WHAT the skill does and WHEN to use it.

disable-model-invocation.description: Optional. If true, the skill only loads when explicitly named (/<name> or read by tool). Default behavior (omitted) is auto-trigger from ambient context.

compatibility.description: Optional. Declares required tools, dependencies, or target agents.

tier.description: Optional. Declares the skill's tier per ai/skill-tiering.md. The folder shape must match the declared tier.

version.description: Optional but recommended. Semantic version of the skill (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH). Bump on every shipped change so consumers can track updates.
